since_last: 55% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.12%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 55% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.63% · BTC -3.48% · Gold -2.65% · Nasdaq100 +0.38%. 55% of 86 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.12%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.12%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -1.09%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: UPST is the standout at +5.94%
cards.body: Leaders: UPST +5.94%, RXRX +4.11%, ZBRA +4.08%, PUBM +3.91%, INTU +3.83%. Laggards: SMR -4.51%, MDB -4.42%, ORCL -4.35%, OKLO -4.34%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.33% at $158.19
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.33% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
